stemHtml: An aircraft is flying slowly at 2000 ft when it experiences an approaching stall. The angle of attack indicator in the flight deck shows an indication of -10° relative to the critical angle of attack. What actions should the pilot take to recover?

options.a: Reduce angle of attack (pitch nose down) until below the critical AoA.
options.b: Add thrust and pitch up to avoid losing altitude.
options.c: Maintain pitch attitude and add thrust only.
options.d: Apply rudder to counter any yaw and maintain heading.
